final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; cityscape spread across full width
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights gradually illuminating, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk scene — neon signs beginning to glow, golden-hour light bouncing off glass towers, street-level crowd in motion
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm sunset-to-cool-neon direction — exact color ratios and tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture documentary feel — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary title, bold modern typeface, prominent placement); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle, secondary); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal framing; must leave sufficient clear zones for text overlays; all three text elements must be legible against the background
Avoid:
